overall.description: A nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city environment from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves from a street corner with bright advertisements, along elevated walkways and under overpasses, across intersections, and ends in a darker plaza corner with atmospheric lighting. The scene features wet reflective streets, holographic advertisements, and diverse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with neon commercial building and elevated walkway access

events.description: turning left and ascending ramp from street level to elevated pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the neon-lit building then turning up the concrete ramp to the elevated walkway

entered.detail: Multi-story building with large illuminated sign reading WIDE OPEN in pink and cyan neon
Tall palm tree with green fronds visible against the night sky
Reflective wet asphalt street with passing vehicles and neon reflections
Concrete ramp leading up to an elevated pedestrian walkway with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a street corner dominated by a commercial building with bright neon signage. The camera moves along the sidewalk past the building, then turns left to ascend a concrete ramp leading to an elevated walkway. A palm tree stands on the right side while cars pass on the wet street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway descending to street intersection with crosswalk

events.description: descending from elevated walkway back to street level under the overpass
traffic light changes from red to green, allowing pedestrians to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered elevated walkway, descending to street level, and crossing the intersection at the yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow outfit and hat waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street

entered.detail: Covered concrete walkway with overhead fluorescent lighting and glass panels
Large corporate billboard displaying the Arasaka logo and branding
Wide pedestrian crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes and red WAIT text
Vertical traffic signal mounted on pole showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a covered elevated walkway with the Arasaka billboard visible in the distance, then descends to street level under an overpass. The scene transitions to a busy intersection where the camera waits at a traffic light before crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk with a crowd of pedestrians as the light turns green.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk under the overpass, passing various neon signs and concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: classic-style black luxury car driving past on the road to the left
pedestrian in white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: Red and white striped concrete barriers separating the sidewalk from the street
Storefront with bright pink neon lighting and vertical Japanese signage
Digital holographic advertisement showing a character in a frame
Food vendor cart with glowing cyan blue lighting and steam rising

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive overpass, the camera passes red and white concrete barriers while cars drive by on the left. The right side features storefronts with bright pink neon lights and holographic advertisements. The segment ends as the camera approaches an illuminated food cart with blue lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with vending machines transitioning to dark corner with street furniture

events.description: passing the food cart and entering the open plaza area with vending machines
approaching darker corner where people are sitting around a small fire or candles

agents.ego_description: walking past the food vendor, through an open plaza with vending machines, and approaching a group of people sitting in a dark corner with a small fire

notable_agents.action: food vendor with red hair standing behind the illuminated cart
two people sitting on abandoned couch and chair around a small fire in the dark corner

entered.detail: Open paved plaza area with scattered debris and transition from covered to open space
Brightly illuminated vending machine with green and red signage displaying beverages
Concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
Abandoned dark-colored couch and wooden coffee table setup in the corner
Small fire or candles on the coffee table providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins as the camera passes the blue-lit food cart and enters an open urban plaza with a brightly lit vending machine on the right. The environment becomes darker as the camera approaches a corner where two people sit on abandoned furniture around a small fire or candles, with graffiti covering the walls behind them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district that shifts from bright commercial corridors to a secluded, gritty urban corner. It begins at a street corner dominated by vivid neon signage, moving past a commercial building before ascending a concrete ramp toward an elevated walkway. As the camera descends from the walkway back to street level, it navigates a busy intersection and crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a crowd of pedestrians. The scene then shifts beneath a massive overpass, passing red and white concrete barriers and pink holographic advertisements before gliding past a blue-lit food cart. Finally, the camera enters an open plaza and moves away from the bright vending machines toward a dark, graffiti-covered corner where two figures sit around a small fire.
